task.description: Fix registration form error display — validation errors not shown to user

assumptions.text: Error validation runs but response format mismatches frontend expectation
The bug is server-side, not client-side JS
Fix is limited to the response handler, not the validation logic

interpretations_considered.description: Response format mismatch — validation runs but returns wrong status code
interpretations_considered.cost_if_wrong: Would waste time checking API contract

interpretations_considered.description: Validation doesn't run before form submission
interpretations_considered.reason_rejected: Form submits successfully, errors just don't display

per_change_justifications.reason: Return 422 with structured error body when validation fails
per_change_justifications.risk: None — only changes status code from 200 to 422

per_change_justifications.reason: Import jsonify (already used elsewhere in file, just reordering)
Fix elif guard to use form_data.get() instead of direct key access
per_change_justifications.risk: KeyError if email not in form_data

detected.evidence: Success test still passes after change

alternatives_skipped.alternative: Rewrite validation function with comprehensive checks

self_evaluation.notes: Fix was surgical. 6 lines, one file, no new deps. Assumption about server-side vs client-side was verified.
